# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [14.x, 16.x]
        python-version: ['3.8', '3.9']
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2
      
    - name: Set up Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
    
    - name: Cache npm dependencies
      id: cache-npm
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: ~/.npm
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ matrix.node-version }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ matrix.node-version }}-
    
    - name: Install npm dependencies
      run: npm ci
    
    - name: Set up Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
    
    - name: Cache pip packages
      id: cache-pip
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: ~/.cache/pip
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ matrix.python-version }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ matrix.python-version }}-
    
    - name: Install pip packages
      run: |
        python -m pip install --upgrade pip
        pip install -r requirements.txt
    
    - name: Cache configuration files
      id: cache-config
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: .config
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ hashFiles('.config/*') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-config-
    
    - name: Build and test
      run: |
        npm run build
        python setup.py test
